com.tonic.jaloc.impl.maps

Class PStructMap<K,V extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeMap<V>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.maps.PStructMap<K,V>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PStructMap<K,V extends PStruct>
extends AbstractNativeMap<V>
    A native primitive-to-struct hash map over struct entries keyed by a layout field; K is declaration metadata only, and any growth invalidates outstanding views.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructMap(NativeAllocator allocator, StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory, java.lang.String keyFieldName, long expectedElements)
      Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the given allocator.
      PStructMap(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory, java.lang.String keyFieldName)
      Creates an empty map keyed by the named layout field on the system allocator.
      PStructMap(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory, java.lang.String keyFieldName, long expectedElements)
      Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the system allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      V cursor() 
      void forEach(java.util.function.Consumer<? super V> consumer)
      Emits every entry through one reusable view; do not hold it across calls.
      V get(double key)
      Reads the entry view for key.
      V get(double key, V cursor)
      Reads the entry for key into cursor.
      V get(long key)
      Reads the entry view for key.
      V get(long key, V cursor)
      Reads the entry for key into cursor.
      V put(double key)
      Upserts key and returns its entry view; existing value fields are preserved, fresh slots arrive zeroed.
      V put(long key)
      Upserts key and returns its entry view; existing value fields are preserved, fresh slots arrive zeroed.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeMap

        clear, containsKey, containsKey, layout, remove, remove, trim

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructMap

        public PStructMap(StructLayout layout,
                  StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory,
                  java.lang.String keyFieldName)
        Creates an empty map keyed by the named layout field on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        keyFieldName - the key field, any type but BOOLEAN
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the key field is unknown or BOOLEAN

      • PStructMap

        public PStructMap(StructLayout layout,
                  StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory,
                  java.lang.String keyFieldName,
                  long expectedElements)
        Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        keyFieldName - the key field, any type but BOOLEAN
        expectedElements - presizes the table
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the key field is unknown or BOOLEAN, or expectedElements is negative

      • PStructMap

        public PStructMap(NativeAllocator allocator,
                  StructLayout layout,
                  StructViewFactory<V> viewFactory,
                  java.lang.String keyFieldName,
                  long expectedElements)
        Creates an empty map presized for expectedElements on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        keyFieldName - the key field, any type but BOOLEAN
        expectedElements - presizes the table
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the key field is unknown or BOOLEAN, or expectedElements is negative

    • Method Detail

      • put

        public V put(long key)
        Upserts key and returns its entry view; existing value fields are preserved, fresh slots arrive zeroed.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        the entry view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • put

        public V put(double key)
        Upserts key and returns its entry view; existing value fields are preserved, fresh slots arrive zeroed.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        the entry view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public V get(long key)
        Reads the entry view for key.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        a fresh view, or null if absent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public V get(double key)
        Reads the entry view for key.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        a fresh view, or null if absent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • cursor

        public V cursor()
        Returns:
        a reusable entry view for cursor lookups
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public V get(long key,
             V cursor)
        Reads the entry for key into cursor.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        cursor - the view to reposition
        Returns:
        cursor, or null if absent with cursor untouched
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if cursor is null
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed, or if cursor predates a growth

      • get

        public V get(double key,
             V cursor)
        Reads the entry for key into cursor.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        cursor - the view to reposition
        Returns:
        cursor, or null if absent with cursor untouched
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if cursor is null
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - on key type mismatch
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed, or if cursor predates a growth

      • forEach

        public void forEach(java.util.function.Consumer<? super V> consumer)
        Emits every entry through one reusable view; do not hold it across calls.
        Parameters:
        consumer - the receiver
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if consumer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
